key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 raising rate expectations
Hotter-than-expected PCE or retail sales data increasing inflation concerns
Reversal in momentum and semiconductor leadership due to valuation compression

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent 30d and 6m trailing returns plus value tilt amid sticky inflation and low GDP growth.
Highest recent 30d return among factors; trend persistence likely to continue into July window.
Leading 30d and 6m performance; earnings growth estimate supports near-term outperformance.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated 3-holding tilt to small-value, momentum, and semiconductors to capture recent factor leadership and earnings momentum over the one-month scoring window.
rationale_summary: Allocates to factors with strongest trailing performance and domestic growth sensitivity ahead of FOMC, retail sales, and GDP releases.
